series_metadata.series_description: These are records documenting an individual''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s claim for money from the Tobacco Settlement Trust. The claims have a Certification Form, Quota Owners and Sharecroppers information, and an Acknowledgement and Certification. The claims contain names, addresses, and social security numbers, and the quota information is also confidential.
